name: Figs with Honey and Mascarpone
recipeIngredient: 1 cup of mascarpone cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the figs in half or into quarters if they are large.
2. Place 1/4 cup of mascarpone on each serving plate.
3. Surround each portion of mascarpone with fig pieces.
4. Drizzle with honey.
5. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
